How It Works

From First Call to Final Handover

Free Site Visit
We visit your home and understand your space & needs
2
Design & Quote
Custom design plan with transparent, itemised pricing

Material Selection
Choose finishes, hardware & colours that suit your taste
4
Execution
Skilled team executes work with regular progress updates
5
Handover
Final walkthrough, cleanup & your keys handed back

Who We Are

Local Expertise, Honest Pricing

M A Interior Design is a Pune-based interior design and execution studio. We're not a franchise of a big chain — we're a local team based right here in Moshi, which means faster site visits, direct communication, and pricing without middlemen.

From modular kitchens to complete home interiors, every project is handled personally — from the first measurement to the final handover.

  • Free site visit & quote
  • Transparent pricing
  • Quality hardware & finishes
  • On-time project delivery
  • Local team, fast response
  • Post-project support

What We Do

Complete Interior Solutions

Every service handled in-house — from design to final installation

Modular Kitchen

Custom-built kitchens with smart storage, durable hardware, and finishes that hold up to daily Indian cooking.

Bedroom Interiors

Wardrobes, feature walls, false ceilings — bedrooms designed as a calm, personal retreat.

Living Room & Hall

TV units, wall panelling, seating & lighting designed for how your family actually lives.

False Ceiling & Lighting

POP & gypsum ceiling designs with layered lighting that changes the feel of every room.

Wallpaper & Wall Panels

Premium wallpaper application and decorative panelling for texture and character.

Full Home Interiors

End-to-end interior solutions for your entire home, managed under one roof.
